title: LEGO NINJAGO 2in1 Lloyd's Jet Mech - Transforms into a Jet Toy - 5 Minifigures Incl. Sora & Lloyd, plus a Motorbike and a Dragon Figure - Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys & Dragons Rising Fans - 71845
features: Ninja toy for 9+ year old boys and girls – Lloyd's Jet Mech building set lets kids recreate thrilling action from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show
Transforming ninja vehicle – Kids can reconfigure the posable LEGO NINJAGO mech with a cockpit and two large swords into a jet toy featuring a cockpit, wings and jet engines
Dragon and motorbike toys – This building toy also includes a flying toy motorbike for Sora to ride and an evil spectre dragon figure for kids to play out even bigger battle scenes
5 LEGO NINJAGO minifigures – Includes ninja Sora and Lloyd, plus the villainous trio of Master of Decay Kur, Tyr and a Spectral Dragonian Warrior for epic NINJAGO battles
Gift idea for kids – This LEGO NINJAGO set offers a fun build-and-play experience and makes a great gift for 9+ year old boys and girls who enjoy storytelling with their ninja heroes
A fun way to build – The LEGO Builder app offers an intuitive building experience, allowing kids to save sets, track progress, and zoom in or rotate models in 3D as they build
A universe of ninja toys – LEGO NINJAGO building sets let kids dive into a fantasy world of action-packed adventures alongside their ninja heroes
description: From the manufacturer LEGO NINJAGO Lloyd’s Jet Mech Kids enjoy ninja action with a playset featuring a mech that transforms into a jet, plus a bike toy, dragon toy and 5 minifigures. Recreate ninja adventures! Ninja fans have all they need to play out all-action scenes from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show. LEGO NINJAGO Lloyd’s Jet Mech Transforming ninja vehicle Kids can play with the model in mech or jet mode. Dragon and motorbike toys Playset includes Sora’s motorbike and a specter dragon. 5 NINJAGO minifigures Sora, Lloyd, Kur, Tyr and a Spectral Dragonian Warrior. Enter a new world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. More LEGO NINJAGO sets to collect Other LEGO NINJAGO sets (sold separately) let kids enjoy even bigger ninja adventures with their heroes.
